source: TicketLodge, Brave Search, SeatGeek, Vivid Seats

comedyMarketOverview.trend: Stand-up is the MOST explosive force in live entertainment in 2026
arenaActs: Nate Bargatze (Big Dumb Eyes World Tour, arenas)
Theo Von (Return of the Rat, theaters→arenas)
comedyMarketOverview.keyInsight: Comedy has transcended to stadium level. Shane Gillis at Lincoln Financial Field = $30 floor because of massive capacity. The MONEY is in theater-level comedians who are about to scale up.
comedyMarketOverview.pricingNote: Comedy ticket prices dip 2-3 hours before showtime as resellers offload. Friday afternoons = deal window.

breakoutComedians2026.name: Robby Hoffman
breakoutComedians2026.evidence: Seth Meyers viral moment → ENTIRE tour sold out. Playing Town Hall NYC (1,500), Fillmore Philly (2,500), 9:30 Club DC (1,200), Wilbur Boston, Danforth Toronto. No secondary pricing yet = EARLY.
breakoutComedians2026.routing: NE corridor + West Coast + Canada. Theater-level (1,200-2,500 cap).
breakoutComedians2026.action: MONITOR — when secondary listings appear, buy NE corridor markets

breakoutComedians2026.name: Stavros Halkias
breakoutComedians2026.evidence: Netflix Fat Rascal special. A24 Bourdain biopic. Dreamboat Tour 40+ cities. Already in BB database.

breakoutComedians2026.name: Michael Blaustein
breakoutComedians2026.evidence: 3.5M TikTok, 164M likes. Stiff Socks podcast. 25+ city tour.

breakoutComedians2026.name: Matt Rife
breakoutComedians2026.evidence: 19M TikTok. Stay Golden World Tour. Moving to arenas. Phoenix Dec 2026 already selling.
breakoutComedians2026.routing: Arena-bound — last theater dates are premium

breakoutComedians2026.name: Jordan Jensen
breakoutComedians2026.evidence: Bradley Cooper film debut. Billboard Critics Pick. Already in BB database.

breakoutComedians2026.name: Druski
breakoutComedians2026.evidence: 10M+ Instagram. Forbes Top Creator. Live tour potential enormous but hasn't fully committed to touring yet.
breakoutComedians2026.routing: When he tours theaters, it'll be instant sellouts

comedyPricingPattern.arenaActs: Face value $30-80, secondary premium low (1.2-1.5x) due to massive supply
comedyPricingPattern.theaterActs: Face value $35-75, secondary premium HIGH (2-5x) when sold out
comedyPricingPattern.clubActs: Face value $20-40, secondary market usually nonexistent
comedyPricingPattern.sweetSpot: Comedian at 1,000-3,000 cap theaters who just went viral or got a Netflix special. 2-4 week window after special drops = peak secondary demand.
comedyPricingPattern.riskFactor: Comedians add shows FAST — a sellout often leads to added dates within days, which kills secondary pricing
